title: What it actually looks like to need other men (and be stronger for it)
caption:
You don't need a large group. You need two or three men who can call you on your stuff and show up when things fall apart.

That's not weakness. That's what the New Testament actually describes. "Two are better than one... and a threefold cord is not quickly broken." — Ecclesiastes 4:9,12.

This kind of brotherhood doesn't happen to you. You build it. You go first into honesty. You stay in it when it costs you. You let them know the real version.

The man who goes it alone isn't stronger. He's just unaccountable. And unaccountable men drift — always.

Tag the man you're doing this with. If you don't have one, today's the day to start asking.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #brotherhood #scripture #christianity #accountability #masculinity
